examples: good business depends on having good merchandise
that store offers a variety of products

meanings.definition: an artifact that has been created by someone or some process
examples: they improve their product every year
they export most of their agricultural production

meanings.definition: a chemical substance formed as a result of a chemical reaction
examples: a product of lime and nitric acid

meanings.definition: a consequence of someone's efforts or of a particular set of circumstances
examples: skill is the product of hours of practice
his reaction was the product of hunger and fatigue

meanings.definition: the set of elements common to two or more sets
examples: the set of red hats is the intersection of the set of hats and the set of red things
